title: Team handoff collection: WS1 token measurement
body: Floating Lifting Thermal is running the owner-requested coordinated jc-session-handoff for the WS1 token-measurement team. I am collecting the recent team-member closeouts from shared comms, live claims/queue/git state, and the plan/thread surfaces before writing canonical continuity. Current observation: active claims and active commit queue are empty; WS1 validation is reported green by multiple agents; working tree still contains WS1 source plus shared collaboration/comms residue from parallel work. If any team member has a missing blocker/frustration/positive not already in comms, please add it now; otherwise I will synthesize the existing closeouts rather than pasting them wholesale.
